story_summary: A dramatic quote-style short uses a persistent armored king figure over a sequence of warm fantasy landscape images while one serif word appears at a time, beginning with a black split-curtain reveal.

source_sampling.method: ffprobe metadata plus ffmpeg frame extraction across the full clip
source_sampling.notes: Representative frames were sampled at 0.25s, 1s, 3s, 5s, 12s, 18s, 28s, and 40s to identify the opening curtain reveal, the persistent knight overlay, and recurring background changes.

audio_notes: Source audio was extracted to source_audio.mp3 for packaging. The audio was reused directly and not separately transcribed.

scenes.summary: A black frame opens into a narrow horizontal slit that reveals a warm landscape plate behind it while the armored king figure already stands at lower center and the first single-word caption appears.

camera.framing: landscape editorial composition with lower-center hero figure
camera.movement: graphic matte reveal rather than live camera movement
camera.stability: static composition with code-driven panel animation

on_screen_text: single centered serif word at a time
opening words include I and in
scenes.environment: Black letterbox-style cover panels with a warm painterly background visible through a thin horizontal opening.
overlay_observations: The armored king remains visually consistent and appears to function like a persistent overlaid foreground element rather than a newly generated character in each shot.

scenes.summary: The curtain resolves into full-frame warm sky and cloud landscapes while the knight remains at lower center and individual words continue to appear one by one near the upper middle of frame.

camera.framing: full-frame cinematic landscape with centered overlay figure
camera.movement: light scale drift and crossfade between background plates
camera.stability: static image sequence with editorial timing

on_screen_text: single-word serif captions such as we, please, and much
scenes.environment: Painterly golden skies, cloud banks, and warm horizon imagery.
overlay_observations: The same knight figure continues across changing backgrounds.

scenes.summary: The clip shifts into moodier cloud and forest plates, occasionally including a second distant seated armored figure within the background art, while the main foreground knight and one-word caption rhythm continue.

camera.framing: landscape scenic art with lower-center foreground figure
camera.movement: background crossfades with minimal editorial drift

on_screen_text: single-word captions such as only, crowded, how, and it
scenes.environment: Fantasy-cloud and forest artwork with warm amber lighting and occasional secondary figure embedded in the background image itself.
overlay_observations: Any extra figures appear inside the background plate and should be treated as part of the source-derived background image, not as reusable foreground cast.

scenes.summary: The final phase continues the same compositing grammar with amber forest backgrounds, the lower-center knight overlay, and the remaining single-word captions toward the close.

camera.framing: same lower-center figure over full-frame cinematic background art

on_screen_text: late single-word captions such as let, you, and and
scenes.environment: Golden forest and sunset-like fantasy imagery.
overlay_observations: The visual system remains constant: swappable background plate, persistent knight overlay, and centered word reveal.
